title: How to book a shipment
summary: A short guide to creating a booking in the app
content: Step-by-step: choose service, enter pickup and delivery, confirm price, and track your shipment in the app.

title: Getting accurate tracking
summary: Tips to make sure you receive reliable tracking updates
content: Ensure correct pickup/delivery addresses, enable location permissions, and refresh the tracking screen if needed.

title: Preparing documents for shipment
summary: Checklist of documents commonly required for logistics
content: Keep invoice, packing list, and any required permits ready to avoid delays during pickup and customs.
